graphScene.exploreHint: Explore — click a molecule or use ← → in the menu

hero.subtitle: An interactive 3D map of the AI Engineering ecosystem.
hero.subtitle2: Each molecule is a topic. Spin, click, explore.

0.title: Welcome to AI MindMap
0.description: Explore AI Engineering concepts in an interactive 3D universe. Click any node to dive deep.

1.title: Navigation
1.description: Use the sidebar to browse 14 topics or click molecules directly in the 3D scene. Steps follow a learning path.

2.title: The 3D Graph
2.description: Drag to rotate the scene. Scroll to zoom. Each molecule floats with its own personality and rotation.

3.title: Detail Panel
3.description: Click any node to open its detail panel with explanations, code examples, pros/cons, and Q&A.

4.title: Learning Path
4.description: Topics are ordered by learning step. Follow the sequence or jump around — the choice is yours.

5.title: Shortcuts & Theme
5.description: Use keyboard: ← → for steps, +/- for zoom, R to reset, E to export. Toggle dark/light in the sidebar.

6.title: Ready? Let's Explore!
6.description: You're all set. Click a molecule, follow the learning path, and become an AI Engineer.
